messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The Operator has no way to pass down a question it cannot answer, so it sits on it
What it solves: THE ASK. The human's requirement has two halves: a message is (a) answered directly by the
Operator, or (b) PASSED DOWN to the relevant agent. BL-369 guarantees the message is never lost on
the way in, and half (a) already works. Half (b) does not exist at all.
How it works: A question the Operator cannot answer is filed for the swarm

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-371 - The Operator has no way to pass down a question it cannot answer, so it sits on it is complete.
